meaning: n.偷牛贼,(早期美国西部的)不法之徒,罪犯,受雇刺客
examples: Thanks to the special effort by badman hero_jang and hing most of the games were completed successfully.
It is what they do that makes them good or bad. A moment of love, even in a badman can give meaning to life.
There was more drama for the bumper 1, 425 crowd to witness when Bath midfielder Mark Badman and Chelmsford's Ricky Modeste were both dismissed following an off-the-ball clash nine minutes from time.
